name: Kateys' Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cubed
10 ounces frozen chopped broccoli, thawed and drained, or
10 ounces fresh broccoli, chopped, lightly steamed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients.
2. Spoon mixture into a 12x8-inch baking dish.
3. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
